subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, Dr. Esslemont et al, spoken on 1919-12-15
subcodes.first_line: It was infinite, unlimited. This is clear. Can a limited power raise such a cause?... Baha'u'llah's last illness lasted twenty-one days.
subcodes.subjects: @special knowledge of the Manifestation of God, @humor; jokes, @humility; meekness; lowliness
